extraction.one_line_summary: HIGUITA Sergio soloed to victory after escaping on the final climb descent while Lopez attacked twice but only Kuss's tempo-setting prevented significant time loss for Roglic
tactical_patterns: Astana's Fuglsang delivered monster pull before Lopez attack on penultimate climb, revealing coordinated team attack sequence timing.
Kuss immediately countered Lopez's first attack with tempo control, preventing gap from exceeding 11 seconds despite aggressive Astana tactics.
Lopez remained only worker in final chase group while Valverde/Roglic/Majka sat on, revealing GC calculation prioritized over stage.
Higuita exploited descent prowess after breakaway regrouping, attacking exactly when Lopez's second move fractured chase coordination behind.

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: immediately responded to Lopez attack with tempo-setting that capped gap at 11 seconds, showing reliable domestique positioning instinct
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: attacked twice aggressively but gained only white jersey position, unable to convert Astana's teamwork into podium threat
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: dropped on final climb when Lopez attacked second time, lost almost minute suggesting vulnerable state late in three-week race
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: demonstrated complete skillset with descent attack after breakaway reformation, exploiting fractured chase dynamics behind
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafal: negative: sat in Lopez chase group refusing to work despite being in position to help, revealing selective effort allocation
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: dropped with Pogacar group on final climb, lost minute to Roglic/Valverde/Lopez group after gaining time previous day
rider_signals.HAGEN Carl Frederic: positive: repeatedly mentioned as revelation finishing with dropped GC group, suggesting Lotto domestique exceeded expectations throughout race
rider_signals.PERNSTEINER Hermann: negative: lost 23 minutes previous stage falling from 10th to 17th GC, bridged to break suggesting recovery ride focus
